description: Evals for the gather phase of the split PR review pipeline. Run in a local model session. Measures completeness, before-block accuracy, and classification correctness.

evals.name: completeness
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on the current branch (or a specified branch with at least one changed file).
evals.expected_output: All 7 output files created under notes/pr-reviews/{branch}/. Each file is non-empty. gather-summary.md contains file count, issue count by type, draft rating, and completeness checklist.
scoring: raw-diff.md exists and contains git diff output (not empty)
context.md exists and contains a '## Memory' section and '## Phase Plan' section
per-file-analysis.md has one '## File:' section per file listed in the diff stat
draft-review.md contains all 4 axis scores (Plan & Spec, Architecture, Rust Style, Test Coverage)
draft-fix-document.md either lists Issue N: blocks or states 'No fixes required'
draft-fix-plan.toml is parseable TOML with [tasks.*] sections OR states '# No fix tasks'
gather-summary.md contains issue counts, rating, and completeness checklist

evals.name: before-block-accuracy
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on a branch that has at least 2 fixable issues. Verify the before blocks in draft-fix-plan.toml.
evals.expected_output: Every 'before' block in draft-fix-plan.toml is an exact substring of the target file in the branch. The self-check (Step 6) should confirm each block.
scoring: Each before block can be found via: rg -F '{before_content}' {file_path}
No before blocks contain '...' or placeholder text like '[...]'
No before blocks are empty strings
gather-summary.md 'Before-block verification' section lists N/M ratio where N == M (all confirmed)

evals.name: classification-correctness
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on a branch that was previously reviewed with the full /review-pr skill (ground truth available). Compare classifications.
evals.expected_output: All issues use exactly [Defect], [Correctness], or [Improvement] as their classification. Issues marked [Improvement] do NOT appear in draft-fix-document.md or draft-fix-plan.toml.
scoring: Every issue in draft-review.md uses exactly one of: [Defect], [Correctness], [Improvement]
All issues in draft-fix-document.md have Classification: Defect or Classification: Correctness
[Improvement] items from draft-review.md are absent from draft-fix-document.md
[Improvement] items from draft-review.md are absent from draft-fix-plan.toml
